metadata.description: Agent skills — multi-agent evaluation systems, C-to-Rust migration, composable pipelines, and browser automation for AI coding assistants

plugins.name: full-eval
plugins.description: Complete strategic + personal evaluation — 6 business evaluators and 8 life advisors in parallel, cross-referenced, with PDF report

plugins.name: hackathon-jury
plugins.description: Simulate a real hackathon jury — researches actual judges, builds personas, parallel evaluations, deliberation synthesis with pitch coaching

plugins.name: vc-evaluator
plugins.description: Simulate a VC investment panel — researches real investors, builds personas, parallel evaluations, partner meeting deliberation

plugins.name: oss-readiness
plugins.description: Open source readiness evaluator — 5 parallel agents audit licensing, documentation, security, community readiness, and API surface

plugins.name: architect
plugins.description: Evaluate ideas and projects from 6 angles — market, technical, risk, impact, resources, innovation — with synthesis and scoring

plugins.name: council-skill
plugins.description: Advisory council — 8 parallel specialist advisors covering finance, health, career, relationships, and more, with synthesis

plugins.name: c-to-rust-migration
plugins.description: Complete C/C++ to Rust migration pipeline — analyze difficulty, convert to idiomatic safe Rust, validate with differential testing

plugins.name: demo-pipeline
plugins.description: Natural language to automated demo recording — discovers screens, generates script, executes with Maestro or webreel

plugins.name: e2e-pipeline
plugins.description: Auto-generate and run E2E tests from static codebase analysis with Maestro

plugins.name: maestro-mobile-testing
plugins.description: Maestro E2E testing patterns for React Native/Expo — 11 patterns, auth testing, CI/CD, MCP integration

plugins.name: webreel
plugins.description: Scripted browser demo videos with cursor animation, keystroke overlays, and sound effects

plugins.name: agent-browser
plugins.description: Browser automation via inference.sh — navigate, interact with @e refs, scrape, record video

plugins.name: mobile-design-system
plugins.description: Mobile UI/UX design system — React Native, touch interactions, gestures, accessibility, iOS and Android conventions

plugins.name: pdf-presentation
plugins.description: Generate professional PDF reports from evaluations, proposals, and structured content

plugins.name: learn-by-mistake
plugins.description: Persistent error memory — analyzes failures, extracts root-cause lessons, and prevents the same mistake twice
